title: High-control save editing
summary: Separate utility mode for direct save manipulation with a clear warning barrier between simulation and editing.
warning_title: Editing can permanently disrupt progression and balance.
safe_desc: Safe Mode emphasizes guided actions and lowers the visual intensity of risky operations.
advanced_desc: Advanced Mode surfaces direct manipulation areas and assumes you understand the balance impact.
empty_desc: This category does not expose tools in the current workspace state.

stage.truck_desc: Repair, fuel, mileage and registration changes for the active truck profile.
stage.trailer_desc: Adjust trailer condition, cargo weight and trailer identity data.
stage.profile_desc: Update money, XP, skills and save-bound profile values in a dedicated editing flow.
stage.settings_desc: Control language, convoy, traffic and advanced configuration switches.

reset.title: Safe Value Reset
reset.summary: Apply custom money, level and XP values to the active save with an automatic undo snapshot.
reset.backup_notice: A backup is created before applying changes.
reset.ready_hint: The active save is used immediately. Leave fields empty to keep current values.
reset.no_save_hint: Select a save before applying reset values.
reset.undo_confirm: Do you really want to restore the save state from before the last edit?

errors.no_values: Enter at least one reset value.

health.title: Health Monitor
health.empty_summary: Load a save to run a health scan.
health.empty_body: The health monitor becomes active once a profile and save are loaded.
health.fix_confirm: Apply the selected safe fix to the active save?

backups.title: Automatic Backups
backups.empty_body: Write operations create timestamped restore points automatically.

restore.title: Restore Preview
restore.empty_body: Select a backup to compare changes before restoring.
restore.confirm: Restore this backup now? A safety backup will be created first.

recovery.entry_summary: Health scan, backups and restore tools.
recovery.entry_empty: Load a save to open health, backup and restore tools.
recovery.header_summary: Monitor save health, manage backups and restore safely.
recovery.reports_summary: Copy the current support report or export logs without leaving the recovery workflow.
